versionGroups.label: Mobile pins its own React 18 + Expo-bundled TS 5.3 + eslint 8 + tailwind 3 during the Phase 6 SDK upgrade window
Web pins TypeScript 5.9.3 — without the pin pnpm's hoisting resolves the mobile ~5.3.3 spec and apps/web typecheck breaks on @vitejs/plugin-react's 5.4+ syntax
tailwind-config peer accepts both Tailwind 3 (mobile/NativeWind) and Tailwind 4 (web)
ui-web declares React 19 as a peer range; the web app pins to an exact 19.x — both satisfy each other
